# submitAppInviteCode

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the submitAppInviteCode mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.submitAppInviteCode({ input: { token: '<String>' } }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run submitAppInviteCode

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.submitAppInviteCode({ input: { token: '<String>' } }).execute();
```
